00026 /*
00027  * System or Host dependent API.  This defines the "porting layer" for
00028  * POSIX.1 compliant operating systems.
00029  */
00030 
00031 #ifndef _SYS_API_H_
00032 #define _SYS_API_H_
00033 
00034 #include "wrappers.h"
00035 
00036 /*
00037  * typedefs_md.h includes basic types for this platform;
00038  * any macros for HPI functions have been moved to "sysmacros_md.h"
00039  */
00040 #include "typedefs.h"
00041 
00042 /*
00043  * Miscellaneous system utility APIs that fall outside the POSIX.1
00044  * spec.
00045  *
00046  * Until POSIX (P1003.1a) formerly P.4 is standard, we'll use our
00047  * time struct definitions found in timeval.h.
00048  */
00049 long     sysGetMilliTicks(void);
00050 long    sysTime(long *);
00051 int64_t sysTimeMillis(void);
00052 
00053 struct tm * sysLocaltime(time_t *, struct tm*);
00054 struct tm * sysGmtime(time_t *, struct tm*);
00055 void        sysStrftime(char *, int, char *, struct tm *);
00056 time_t      sysMktime(struct tm*);
00057 
00058 /*
00059  * System API for general allocations
00060  */
00061 void *    sysMalloc(size_t);
00062 void *    sysRealloc(void*, size_t);
00063 void    sysFree(void*);
00064 void *    sysCalloc(size_t, size_t);
00065 #ifdef PAGED_HEAPS
00066 void *  sysAllocBlock(size_t, void**);
00067 void    sysFreeBlock(void *);
00068 #endif /* PAGED_HEAPS */
00069 
00070 /*
00071  * System API for dynamic linking libraries into the interpreter
00072  */
00073 char *  sysInitializeLinker(void);
00074 int     sysAddDLSegment(char *);
00075 void    sysSaveLDPath(char *);
00076 long    sysDynamicLink(char *);
00077 void    sysBuildLibName(char *, int, char *, char *);
00078 int     sysBuildFunName(char *, int, void *, int);
00079 long *  sysInvokeNative(void *, void *, long *, char *, int, void *);
00080 
00081 /*
00082  * System API for invoking the interpreter from native applications
00083  */
00084 void    sysGetDefaultJavaVMInitArgs(void *);
00085 int     sysInitializeJavaVM(void *, void *);
00086 int     sysFinalizeJavaVM(void *);
00087 void    sysAttachThreadLock();
00088 void    sysAttachThreadUnlock();
00089 
00090 /*
00091  * System API for threads
00092  */
00093 typedef struct  sys_thread sys_thread_t;
00094 typedef struct  sys_mon sys_mon_t;
00095 typedef void *  stackp_t;
00096 
00097 int     sysThreadBootstrap(sys_thread_t **, void *);
00098 void     sysThreadInitializeSystemThreads(void);
00099 
00100 int    sysThreadCreate(long, unsigned int flags, void *(*)(void *),
00101             sys_thread_t **, void *);
00102 
00103 void    sysThreadExit(void);
00104 sys_thread_t * sysThreadSelf(void);
00105 void    sysThreadYield(void);
00106 int     sysThreadVMSuspend(sys_thread_t *, sys_thread_t *);
00107 void    sysThreadVMSuspendMe(void);
00108 int     sysThreadVMUnsuspend(sys_thread_t *);
00109 int    sysThreadSuspend(sys_thread_t *);
00110 int    sysThreadResume(sys_thread_t *);
00111 int    sysThreadSetPriority(sys_thread_t *, int);
00112 int    sysThreadGetPriority(sys_thread_t *, int *);
00113 void *  sysThreadStackPointer(sys_thread_t *);
00114 stackp_t sysThreadStackBase(sys_thread_t *);
00115 void    sysThreadSetStackBase(sys_thread_t *, stackp_t);
00116 int    sysThreadSingle(void);
00117 void    sysThreadMulti(void);
00118 int     sysThreadEnumerateOver(int (*)(sys_thread_t *, void *), void *);
00119 void    sysThreadInit(sys_thread_t *, stackp_t);
00120 void *  sysThreadGetBackPtr(sys_thread_t *);
00121 int     sysThreadCheckStack(void);
00122 int     sysInterruptsPending(void);
00123 void    sysThreadPostException(sys_thread_t *, void *);
00124 void    sysThreadDumpInfo(sys_thread_t *);
00125 void    sysThreadInterrupt(sys_thread_t *);
00126 int     sysThreadIsInterrupted(sys_thread_t *, long);
00127 int     sysThreadAlloc(sys_thread_t **, stackp_t, void *);
00128 int     sysThreadFree(sys_thread_t *);
00129 
00130 /*
00131  * System API for monitors
00132  */
00133 int     sysMonitorSizeof(void);
00134 int     sysMonitorInit(sys_mon_t *);
00135 int     sysMonitorDestroy(sys_mon_t *);
00136 int     sysMonitorEnter(sys_mon_t *);
00137 bool    sysMonitorEntered(sys_mon_t *);
00138 int     sysMonitorExit(sys_mon_t *);
00139 int     sysMonitorNotify(sys_mon_t *);
00140 int     sysMonitorNotifyAll(sys_mon_t *);
00141 int     sysMonitorWait(sys_mon_t *, int, bool);
00142 void    sysMonitorDumpInfo(sys_mon_t *);
00143 bool    sysMonitorInUse(sys_mon_t *);
00144 
00145 #define SYS_OK            0
00146 #define SYS_ERR           -1
00147 #define SYS_INTRPT     -2    /* Operation was interrupted */
00148 #define SYS_TIMEOUT    -3    /* A timer ran out */
00149 #define SYS_NOMEM      -5    /* Ran out of memory */
00150 #define SYS_NORESOURCE -6    /* Ran out of some system resource */
00151 
00152 /*
00153  * Symbolic constant to be used when waiting indefinitely on a condition
00154  * variable
00155  */
00156 #define SYS_TIMEOUT_INFINITY -1
00157 
00158 /*
00159  * System API for raw memory allocation
00160  */
00161 void *  sysMapMem(long, long *);
00162 void *  sysUnmapMem(void *, long, long *);
00163 void *  sysCommitMem(void *, long, long *);
00164 void *  sysDecommitMem(void *, long, long *);
00165 void *  sysUncommitMem(void *, long, long *);
00166 
00167 /*
00168  * System API for termination
00169  */
00170 void    sysExit(int);
00171 int    sysAtexit(void (*func)(void));
00172 void    sysAbort(void);
00173 
00174 /*
00175  * System API for files
00176  */
00177 extern int sysIsAbsolute(const char* path);
00178 extern int sysAccess(const char* pFile, int perm);
00179 
00180 extern int sysStat(const char *path, struct stat *sbuf);
00181 extern int sysFStat(int fd, struct stat * sbuf);
00182 
00183 extern int sysOpen(const char *name, int openMode, int filePerm);
00184 extern int sysClose(int fd);
00185 
00186 extern long sysSeek(int fd, long offset, int whence);
00187 extern int sysAvailable(int fd, long* bytes);
00188 extern size_t sysRead(int fd, void *buf, unsigned int nBytes);
00189 extern size_t sysWrite(int fd, const void *buf, unsigned int nBytes);
00190 
00191 extern int sysRename(const char* srcName, const char* dstName);
00192 extern int sysUnlink(const char* file);
00193 
00194 extern int sysMkdir(const char* path, int mode);
00195 extern int sysRmdir(const char* path);
00196 extern int sysCanonicalPath(char *path, char *result, int result_len);
00197 
00198 /*
00199  * API support needed for various multiprocessor related synchronization
00200  * primitives.  Systems that don't use real threads can just define
00201  * these to be 0 in their sysmacros_md.h.
00202  */
00203 
00204 int sysIsMP();
00205 void sysMemoryFlush();
00206 void sysStoreBarrier();
00207 
00208 /*
00209  * Include platform specific macros to override these
00210  */
00211 #include "sysmacros_md.h"
00212 
00213 #endif /* !_SYS_API_H_ */
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:28 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
